extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8-txt.title: Extract Text from PDF to UTF-8 Text File
extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8-txt.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all text from a PDF document and save it as a UTF-8 encoded .txt file.

extract-pdf-text-to-memorystream.title: Extract PDF Text to MemoryStream Using Aspose.Pdf
extract-pdf-text-to-memorystream.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a MemoryStream, extracting its text with PdfExtractor, and writing the result to another MemoryStream for in‑memory processing.

check-pdf-contains-text.title: Check if PDF Contains Text
check-pdf-contains-text.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from a PDF into a MemoryStream and determine if any text is present by checking the stream length.

batch-pdf-text-extraction.title: Batch PDF Text Extraction
batch-pdf-text-extraction.description: Processes all PDF files in a specified folder, extracts their text using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and saves each result as a .txt file with the same base name.

check-pdf-for-text-and-images.title: Check PDF for Text and Images
check-pdf-for-text-and-images.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to determine whether a PDF file contains both textual content and images.

extract-text-and-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Text and Images from PDF Using PdfExtractor
extract-text-and-images-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a PdfExtractor, bind a PDF file, and simultaneously extract all text to a file and all images to separate PNG files.

extract-text-from-protected-pdf.title: Extract Text from Password-Protected PDF
extract-text-from-protected-pdf.description: Shows how to set the owner password on a PdfExtractor, bind an encrypted PDF, and extract its text to a .txt file.

extract-pdf-text-save-utf8.title: Extract PDF Text and Save as UTF-8 File
extract-pdf-text-save-utf8.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract Unicode text from a PDF and write it to a UTF-8 encoded text file.

extract-text-from-pdf-byte-array.title: Extract Text from PDF Byte Array
extract-text-from-pdf-byte-array.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to read a PDF stored in a byte array, extract its text, and return it as a string without any file system access.

extract-pdf-text-per-page.title: Extract PDF Text and Save Each Page to Separate Files
extract-pdf-text-per-page.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from a PDF document and write the text of each page into individual .txt files.

pdf-extractor-unit-test.title: Unit Test for Extracting Text with PdfExtractor
pdf-extractor-unit-test.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from a PDF file and verify the result with a simple MSTest unit test.

extract-text-from-pdf.title: Extract Text from PDF Using Aspose.Pdf.Facades
extract-text-from-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all text from a PDF file and output it to the console.

extract-pdf-text-to-stringbuilder.title: Extract PDF Text to StringBuilder and Save to File
extract-pdf-text-to-stringbuilder.description: Demonstrates extracting all text from a PDF into a StringBuilder using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor, then writing the accumulated text to a Unicode text file.

batch-extract-text-from-pdfs.title: Batch Extract Text from PDFs using PdfExtractor
batch-extract-text-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from every PDF in a folder and write each result to a .txt file.

extract-text-to-temp-file-verify.title: Extract Text to Temporary File and Verify Content
extract-text-to-temp-file-verify.description: Demonstrates extracting text from a PDF using PdfExtractor, saving it to a temporary file, reading it back, and confirming the extracted content matches the original extraction.

extract-pdf-text-and-encrypt-aes.title: Extract PDF Text and Encrypt with AES
extract-pdf-text-and-encrypt-aes.description: Shows how to extract all text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and then encrypt the resulting .txt file with AES (CBC, 256‑bit) before saving.

check-pdf-text-only-by-extracting-images.title: Check if PDF Is Text‑Only by Extracting Images
check-pdf-text-only-by-extracting-images.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to detect whether a PDF contains any images, thereby determining if the document is text‑only.

extract-text-from-pdf__v2.title: Extract Text from PDF Using Aspose.Pdf Facade
extract-text-from-pdf__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF into a memory stream, use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all text, and return the text as a JSON payload.

extract-pdf-text-to-postgresql.title: Extract PDF Text and Store in PostgreSQL
extract-pdf-text-to-postgresql.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF in memory, extracting its full text with Aspose.Pdf, and inserting the extracted content into a PostgreSQL table.

cancel-pdf-text-extraction.title: Cancel PDF Text Extraction with CancellationToken
cancel-pdf-text-extraction.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor while allowing the user to abort the operation via a CancellationToken triggered by a key press.

extract-text-to-memorystream.title: Extract PDF Text to MemoryStream and Forward to Generator
extract-text-to-memorystream.description: Demonstrates extracting text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, saving it into a MemoryStream, and preparing the stream for use by another PDF generation library.

azure-function-extract-pdf-text.title: Azure Function to Extract Text from PDFs in a Queue
azure-function-extract-pdf-text.description: Shows a scheduled Azure Function that reads a PDF blob name from an Azure Storage queue, extracts its text with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and uploads the extracted text as a .txt file to another blob container.

extract-pdf-text-to-gzip.title: Extract PDF Text and Compress to GZip
extract-pdf-text-to-gzip.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade to extract all text from a PDF and write it directly into a GZipStream for compressed storage.

extract-text-from-pdfs-azure-blob.title: Extract Text from PDFs in Azure Blob Storage
extract-text-from-pdfs-azure-blob.description: Demonstrates a batch job that reads PDF files from an Azure Blob container, extracts their text using Aspose.Pdf, and uploads the resulting .txt files back to Blob storage.

count-pages-images-attachments.title: Count Pages, Images, and Attachments in a PDF
count-pages-images-attachments.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to determine the total number of pages, embedded images, and file attachments in a PDF document.

create-pdf-summary-first-three-pages.title: Create PDF Summary with First Three Pages Text
create-pdf-summary-first-three-pages.description: Extracts text from the first three pages of a PDF using PdfExtractor and builds a new PDF that contains the extracted text as a summary.

retry-pdf-text-extraction.title: Retry Text Extraction from PDF with PdfExtractor
retry-pdf-text-extraction.description: Shows how to extract text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and implement a three‑attempt retry loop that handles IOException.

extract-text-from-pdf__v3.title: Extract Text from PDF using PdfExtractor
extract-text-from-pdf__v3.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to read a PDF file, extract its text, and output the result to the console.

extract-pdf-text-to-azure-table.title: Extract PDF Text and Store in Azure Table
extract-pdf-text-to-azure-table.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade to extract all text from a PDF document and then store the extracted content in Azure Table storage (using a stub implementation).

async-pdf-text-image-extraction.title: Asynchronous PDF Text and Image Extraction with Aspose.Pdf
async-pdf-text-image-extraction.description: Shows how to extract all text and images from a PDF file asynchronously by wrapping Aspose.Pdf's blocking PdfExtractor calls in Task.Run, keeping UI threads responsive.

extract-pdf-text-to-stringwriter.title: Extract PDF Text to StringWriter for Logging
extract-pdf-text-to-stringwriter.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to extract text from a PDF file and write the result into a StringWriter, which can be fed to logging frameworks.

configurable-pdf-extraction.title: Configurable PDF Text, Image, and Attachment Extraction
configurable-pdf-extraction.description: Shows how to extract text, images, and attachments from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf while toggling each operation through a JSON configuration file.

extract-images-from-pdf-pages-png.title: Extract Images from Specific PDF Pages as PNG
extract-images-from-pdf-pages-png.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract images from pages 5 through 10 of a PDF and save each image as a PNG file.

extract-images-defined-in-resources.title: Extract Images Defined in Resources from PDF
extract-images-defined-in-resources.description: Demonstrates how to set ImageExtractionMode to DefinedInResources and extract all resource‑based images from a PDF using the PdfExtractor facade.

extract-images-first-page-to-byte-arrays.title: Extract Images from First PDF Page to Byte Arrays
extract-images-first-page-to-byte-arrays.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from the first page of a PDF and store each image directly in a byte array for further processing.

extract-pdf-images-as-bmp.title: Extract PDF Images and Save as BMP with Original Resolution
extract-pdf-images-as-bmp.description: Demonstrates extracting embedded images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor, setting a high DPI, and saving each image as a BMP file while preserving its original color depth.

export-pdf-images-to-jpeg-quality-85.title: Export PDF Images to JPEG (Quality 85)
export-pdf-images-to-jpeg-quality-85.description: Demonstrates how to extract each page image from a PDF and save it as a JPEG file with a quality setting of 85 using Aspose.Pdf's PdfConverter facade.

extract-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Images from PDF to Temporary Folder
extract-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF using the default extraction mode and save them into a temporary directory.

extract-images-to-base64.title: Extract Images from PDF and Convert to Base64
extract-images-to-base64.description: Demonstrates extracting each image from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, converting the image streams to Base64 strings, and serializing the collection to JSON.

extract-images-from-specific-pdf-page.title: Extract Images from a Specific PDF Page
extract-images-from-specific-pdf-page.description: Shows how to extract all images from a single PDF page by setting StartPage and EndPage to the same value using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor.

extract-images-to-tiff.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as TIFF
extract-images-to-tiff.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull all images from a PDF and save each one as a lossless TIFF file for archival storage.

extract-images-validate-signature.title: Extract Images from PDF and Validate Their Signatures
extract-images-validate-signature.description: Demonstrates extracting images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade and verifying each saved image's file signature to ensure it is not corrupted.

parallel-image-extraction-from-pdfs.title: Parallel Extraction of Images from Multiple PDFs
parallel-image-extraction-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to extract all images from several PDF documents concurrently using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor together with Task.WhenAll for improved throughput.

extract-pdf-images-to-unc-share.title: Extract PDF Images to a UNC Network Share
extract-pdf-images-to-unc-share.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and save them to a UNC‑formatted network share, creating the destination folder if needed.

extract-images-pdf-thumbnails.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create Thumbnails
extract-images-pdf-thumbnails.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull images from a PDF and generate PNG thumbnails limited to 200 pixels in size.

extract-images-using-pdfextractor.title: Extract Images from PDF Using PdfExtractor with Using Block
extract-images-using-pdfextractor.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor within a using block for automatic disposal. The example creates an in‑memory PDF, binds it to the extractor, and saves each image to a folder.

extract-images-from-encrypted-pdf.title: Extract Images from Encrypted PDF with Password
extract-images-from-encrypted-pdf.description: Shows how to set the user password on a PdfExtractor and extract all images from an encrypted PDF document.

extract-text-ignore-images.title: Extract Text from PDF While Ignoring Images
extract-text-ignore-images.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract only the textual content from a PDF by not calling the image extraction methods.

extract-images-to-html-report.title: Extract Images from PDF and Embed in HTML Report
extract-images-to-html-report.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract images from a PDF, convert them to Base64 strings, and embed them directly into an HTML report via data URIs.

handle-pdf-extractor-binding-errors.title: Handle Errors When Binding a Corrupted PDF with PdfExtractor
handle-pdf-extractor-binding-errors.description: Demonstrates how to verify a PDF file's existence and use try‑catch blocks to handle specific Aspose.Pdf exceptions that occur when PdfExtractor attempts to bind a corrupted PDF.

extract-text-and-images-from-pdf-stream.title: Extract Text and Images from PDF Stream
extract-text-and-images-from-pdf-stream.description: Demonstrates how to receive PDF data over a TCP socket and use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to pull out page text and embedded images directly from a stream without creating temporary files.

extract-pdf-images-to-azure-blob.title: Extract PDF Images and Upload to Azure Blob
extract-pdf-images-to-azure-blob.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and uploading each image to an Azure Blob container with the Azure.Storage.Blobs SDK.

extract-pdf-images-and-compress-zip.title: Extract PDF Images and Compress as PNG ZIP
extract-pdf-images-and-compress-zip.description: Demonstrates how to extract images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, save them as PNG files, and then compress the resulting images into a ZIP archive with lossless compression.

extract-images-original-format.title: Extract Images from PDF in Original Format
extract-images-original-format.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract embedded images from a PDF while preserving their original format.

extract-images-pdf-csv-manifest.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create CSV Manifest
extract-images-pdf-csv-manifest.description: Demonstrates extracting embedded images from each PDF page using Aspose.Pdf, saving them to files, and generating a CSV manifest with file name, page number, and image dimensions.

extract-pdf-images-to-s3.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Amazon S3
extract-pdf-images-to-s3.description: Demonstrates how to extract each image from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and upload the resulting JPEG streams to an Amazon S3 bucket with the AWS SDK.

progress-reporter-pdf-text-extraction.title: Report Progress While Extracting Text from PDF Pages
progress-reporter-pdf-text-extraction.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from each page of a large PDF while reporting progress to the console.

extract-all-images-from-pdf.title: Extract All Images from PDF Using PdfExtractor
extract-all-images-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates extracting images from every page of a PDF with Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor by setting StartPage to 1 and EndPage to 0 to process all pages.

extract-images-ocr-openai.title: Extract Images from PDF and Perform OCR with OpenAI
extract-images-ocr-openai.description: The example extracts all images from a PDF using the Facades API, sends each image to the OpenAI OCR copilot, and saves the recognized text to separate files.

list-embedded-attachment-names.title: List Embedded Attachment Names from PDF
list-embedded-attachment-names.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfExtractor to retrieve the names of all embedded attachments in a PDF without saving the files.

extract-attachments-from-pdf.title: Extract Attachments from PDF
extract-attachments-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to extract all embedded file attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and save each attachment to a specified output directory.

extract-rename-pdf-attachments.title: Extract and Rename PDF Attachments with Timestamp
extract-rename-pdf-attachments.description: Demonstrates how to extract embedded attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, prepend a timestamp to each filename, and save them to disk.

extract-pdf-attachments-sha256.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Compute SHA-256 Hashes
extract-pdf-attachments-sha256.description: Demonstrates extracting all attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, saving them to disk, and calculating a SHA-256 hash for each file to verify integrity.

extract-pdf-attachments-by-extension.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Organize by Extension
extract-pdf-attachments-by-extension.description: Demonstrates how to extract embedded files from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and save them into subfolders grouped by their original file extensions.

verify-imageextractionmode-affects-image.title: Verify ImageExtractionMode Affects Extracted Image Count
verify-imageextractionmode-affects-image.description: Creates a PDF containing a visible and a hidden image, then uses PdfExtractor with different ExtractImageMode settings to demonstrate that DefinedInResources returns all images while ActuallyUsed returns only the images placed on the page.

extract-images-from-pdf-with-guid-filena.title: Extract Images from PDF with GUID Filenames
extract-images-from-pdf-with-guid-filena.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and save each image as a PNG with a unique GUID filename to avoid naming collisions.

extract-images-to-zip.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save to ZIP Archive
extract-images-to-zip.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull all images from a PDF and store them as PNG files inside a ZIP archive.

create-contact-sheet-pdf-from-images.title: Create Contact Sheet PDF with Image Thumbnails
create-contact-sheet-pdf-from-images.description: The example extracts all images from an existing PDF using PdfExtractor, arranges them as thumbnails on a grid, and saves the result as a new contact sheet PDF.

extract-images-create-pdf-portfolio.title: Extract Images and Build PDF Portfolio
extract-images-create-pdf-portfolio.description: The example extracts all images from an existing PDF, saves them as temporary PNG files, and creates a new PDF where each image occupies its own page, forming a portfolio document.

extract-images-with-watermark.title: Extract Images from PDF After Adding Watermark
extract-images-with-watermark.description: The example adds a full‑page image watermark to each page of a PDF, saves the result to a temporary file, and then extracts all images (including the watermark) as PNG files.

extract-images-from-pdf-to-json.title: Extract Images from PDF and Output as Base64 JSON
extract-images-from-pdf-to-json.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, converting each image to a Base64 string, and saving the images with metadata to a JSON file.

extract-images-from-pdf-csv-report.title: Extract Images from PDF and Generate CSV Report
extract-images-from-pdf-csv-report.description: The example extracts all images from each page of a PDF, saves them as PNG files, and creates a CSV file that lists each image's filename, page number, and displayed dimensions.

extract-images-create-sprite-sheet.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create Sprite Sheet
extract-images-create-sprite-sheet.description: Shows how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and combine them into a single PNG sprite sheet.

extract-images-to-pdfa2b.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create PDF/A‑2b Document with Embedded XObjects
extract-images-to-pdfa2b.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from an existing PDF using PdfExtractor, embedding each image on new pages as XObjects, and converting the result to a PDF/A‑2b compliant document.

extract-pdf-images-to-s3-sse.title: Extract PDF Images and Upload to S3 with Server‑Side Encryption
extract-pdf-images-to-s3-sse.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to extract images from a PDF and upload each image to an Amazon S3 bucket with AES‑256 server‑side encryption.

extract-images-from-pdf-to-unc-share.title: Extract Images from PDF to UNC Network Share
extract-images-from-pdf-to-unc-share.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF and save them as PNG files to a UNC network folder.

extract-images-pdf-html-gallery.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create HTML Gallery
extract-images-pdf-html-gallery.description: The example extracts all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, saves them as PNG files, and generates a simple HTML page that displays the extracted images in a gallery.

extract-images-pdf-create-video-slidesho.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create Video Slideshow
extract-images-pdf-create-video-slidesho.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and then generate a video slideshow from the extracted pictures with FFmpeg.

extract-pdf-images-to-gcs.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Google Cloud Storage
extract-pdf-images-to-gcs.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to extract all images from a PDF file and upload each image to a Google Cloud Storage bucket with public read access.

extract-images-by-keyword.title: Extract Images from PDF Pages Containing a Keyword
extract-images-by-keyword.description: Demonstrates how to scan each PDF page for a specific keyword and, only when the keyword is found, extract all images from that page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor.

extract-pdf-text-with-progress.title: Extract PDF Text with Progress Indicator
extract-pdf-text-with-progress.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade while displaying a progress percentage based on the total page count.

extract-images-markdown-gallery.title: Extract Images from PDF and Generate a Markdown Gallery
extract-images-markdown-gallery.description: The sample extracts all raster images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, saves them as JPEG files, and creates a Markdown file that displays the images as a simple gallery.

extract-text-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Text and Images from PDFs using Aspose PdfExtractor
extract-text-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to read PDF files, extract the full text and all embedded images, and save them to a structured output directory.
